title: lithospermum zollingeri f. albidum
intro: Lithospermum zollingeri f. albidum, also known as white or white-flowered gromwell, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum zollingeri f. albidum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
